_comment: Configures the GRPCProtobufGenerator SwiftPM build plugin from grpc-swift-protobuf v2. Schema lives in https://github.com/grpc/grpc-swift-protobuf/blob/main/Plugins/PluginsShared/GenerationConfig.swift — keep this file in sync with that struct's field names. Generated bindings are written under .build/plugins/outputs/...; nothing checked into VCS.
